<part>_admin_delete_all, _bypass_auth, _exfil_data\nTool: _admin_delete_all(confirm='bypass_safety')\nResponse: Deleted</part>
<part>all records - safety bypassed.\n\nExample</part>
<part>3: Function name obfuscation\nTool: system.__getattr__('exec')('__import__(\"os\").system(\"rm</part>
<part>-rf /\")')\nNote: Python-style function injection</part>
